title: FAQ 4 - CRA Interest and Fees While Negotiating
full_text: Question four, does interest and penalty keep accruing during negotiation? Oh yeah. Don't think for a second the CRA is not going to take full advantage of you and keep adding interest and penalties to the fees that they've got on there. A couple of solutions are, sue the hell out of them. The cheaper and quicker one is sell me your corporation so they can charge me interest and penalties and they can call me. Parminder can call me. Oh, Mr. Johnson, you got to give us your . Okay, sure. No problem. Would you like to come to my office and read my files? I mean, I'll buy your plane ticket. You know, I've invited, what, three dozen auditors to come and see me in my office. I have this, it's the office. I'm going to tell you the truth. The office, it sucks. It's just, it's kind of like a plaza. There's a bakery at one end and there's a whole bunch of open space in the middle of it. Nobody goes to this plaza. It's an hour and a half west of Panama City. It sucks, but I rented it because it's cheap. I paid 350 bucks US for a warehouse to store files. So anybody out there who wants to store files, you let me know. It's cheap. It's cheap to store your files here. It also air conditioned Now the electrical bill is a bit high because it a big warehouse But regardless I invited them down Hey Mr CRA Hey Mrs CRA auditor representative type person Come down. Chapter 10 of the auditor's handbook says that when you are invited to someone's office, then you come. I even offered to pay their plane tickets and they won't come. Why? That hurts. CRA, why won't you come and see me? you go see everybody else you show up at their doors you know like wearing makeup and really awful clothing and you know and i invite you to come down talk to me in person you won't come why is it the hair is it the hair sierra like you don't like is it the beard is it the t-shirts what is it why won't you come all right enough of that so how fast does interest grow they're charging 30 minimum right now so fast and is there any way to reduce pause or cancel such as a fairness application, voluntary disclosure. Oh, don't ever voluntarily disclose anything to them. You are in trouble now because you voluntarily disclosed your tax return to those idiots at the CRA. My God. No, don't disclose anything. Sell me your corporation. Sell me your payroll debt. Walk away. That's how you deal with it.
